root_text.an5.272:1.1: “Pañcahi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato bhattuddesako na sammannitabbo.
root_text.an5.272:1.3: Chandāgatiṁ gacchati, dosāgatiṁ gacchati, mohāgatiṁ gacchati, bhayāgatiṁ gacchati, uddiṭṭhānuddiṭṭhaṁ na jānāti.
root_text.an5.272:1.4: Imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahi dhammehi samannāgato bhattuddesako na sammannitabbo.
root_text.an5.272:2.1: Pañcahi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato bhattuddesako sammannitabbo.
root_text.an5.272:2.3: Na chandāgatiṁ gacchati, na dosāgatiṁ gacchati, na mohāgatiṁ gacchati, na bhayāgatiṁ gacchati, uddiṭṭhānuddiṭṭhaṁ jānāti.
root_text.an5.272:2.4: Imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahi dhammehi samannāgato bhattuddesako sammannitabboti.
root_text.an5.272:3.1: Pañcahi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato bhattuddesako sammato na pesetabbo …pe… sammato pesetabbo … bālo veditabbo … paṇḍito veditabbo … khataṁ upahataṁ attānaṁ pariharati … akkhataṁ anupahataṁ attānaṁ pariharati … yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ niraye … yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ sagge.
root_text.an5.272:3.3: Na chandāgatiṁ gacchati, na dosāgatiṁ gacchati, na mohāgatiṁ gacchati, na bhayāgatiṁ gacchati, uddiṭṭhānuddiṭṭhaṁ jānāti.
root_text.an5.272:3.4: Imehi kho, bhikkhave, pañcahi dhammehi samannāgato bhattuddesako yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ sagge”ti.

translation_text.an5.272:1.1: “Mendicants, someone with five qualities should not be appointed as meal assigner.
translation_text.an5.272:1.3: They make decisions prejudiced by favoritism, hostility, stupidity, and cowardice. And they don’t know if a meal has been assigned or not.
translation_text.an5.272:1.4: Someone with these five qualities should not be appointed as meal assigner.
translation_text.an5.272:2.1: Someone with five qualities should be appointed as meal assigner.
translation_text.an5.272:2.3: They don’t make decisions prejudiced by favoritism, hostility, stupidity, and cowardice. And they know if a meal has been assigned or not.
translation_text.an5.272:2.4: Someone with these five qualities should be appointed as meal assigner.
translation_text.an5.272:3.1: Someone with five qualities who has been appointed as meal assigner should not be called upon … should be called upon … should be known as a fool … should be known as astute … they keep themselves broken and damaged … they keep themselves unbroken and undamaged … is placed in hell as if delivered there … is placed in heaven as if delivered there.
translation_text.an5.272:3.3: They don’t make decisions prejudiced by favoritism, hostility, stupidity, and cowardice. And they know if a meal has been assigned or not.
translation_text.an5.272:3.4: A meal assigner with these five qualities is placed in heaven as if delivered there.”
